.gitignore.general_idea: Exclude the main application properties file from version control to prevent committing sensitive configuration or local overrides.
Exclude the application log file from version control to avoid tracking runtime artifacts.
Exclude the HTML report directory from version control to avoid tracking generated test or coverage reports.
Exclude the logs directory from version control to avoid tracking runtime artifacts.
Exclude the Maven wrapper directory from version control, likely to enforce a specific local Maven installation or clean up wrapper artifacts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

src/main/java/com/identlite/IdentliteApp.general_idea: Enable Spring's asynchronous method execution support by adding the @EnableAsync annotation.

Remove unused import for Spring Bean configuration which is no longer used in this class.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Book.general_idea: Remove unused Jackson annotations and Lombok constructor annotations to simplify the DTO class.
Replace old booking fields (id, checkInDate, checkOutDate, room, user) with new simplified fields (hotel, startDate, endDate).

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/Hote.general_idea: Remove unused Lombok annotations to simplify the DTO class definition.
Remove unused Java imports for List, Set, and Lombok annotations.
Add a new 'city' field to the HotelDto to capture location data.
Remove 'rooms' and 'amenities' fields from HotelDto to decouple or simplify the data structure.

src/main/java/com/identlite/api/dto/User.general_idea: Removed Jackson annotations to simplify the DTO structure.
Removed Lombok annotations to replace them with explicit Java code.
Added explicit import for ArrayList to support manual list initialization.
Renamed field from username to name to better reflect the data model.
Removed password field and its associated Jackson ignore annotation from the DTO.
Removed JsonManagedReference annotation from the bookings list.
Replaced Lombok @NoArgsConstructor with an explicit empty constructor.
Replaced Lombok @AllArgsConstructor with an explicit constructor that initializes the bookings list.

Added application-specific package logging level configuration for debug visibility.
Added console logging pattern configuration to standardize output format.
Added file logging pattern configuration to standardize file output format.
